summary: Excellent soundboard‑style mix captures a first‑set powerhouse with Shakedown, Bird Song > Greatest Story and a scorching China > Rider transition.
review: The recording is praised for its crisp, well‑balanced mix that sounds almost like a professional soundboard capture. Musically the show shines on the opening set – Shakedown, Candyman, Bird Song > Greatest Story and a blistering China > Rider are highlighted as standout moments – while the second set is more mixed but still delivers energy with Tom Thumb’s and Lovelight. Overall fans rate the performance highly despite a few uneven spots.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers (15+) give 4‑5 stars, praise both the musical set and the clear, balanced recording; only a few note minor performance slips, so the combined show (70%) + recording (30%) score is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the mix as crisp, well‑balanced and ‘sounding perfect’; no major drop‑outs or muddiness are mentioned.

standout_songs: Bird Song > Greatest Story Ever Told
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is consistently praised for its energy and seamless segues, especially the Bird Song > Greatest Story transition. The second set is uneven – a meandering China > Rider that still excites, followed by mixed performances on Estimated Prophet, Eyes of the World and Space, but finishes strong with Tom Thumb’s and Lovelight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly noted for feeling it, delivering powerful guitar tones (Shakedown, Candyman) and even scowling at Bob during transitions; overall a high‑energy performance.
band_member_comments.Bob: His “Na na nahs” on Estimated Prophet are highlighted as both comedic and energetic; some reviewers call his vocal delivery dour in one version.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) gets credit for contagious enthusiasm on Fantasy and Hey Jude; overall keyboards sit well in the mix.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drummers are described as “whipping it up” with strong energy, though a few notes mention occasional sloppiness.
